name: Orris Vane
excerpt: A character with a complex relationship with Fen Caldra.
notes: Orris Vane has a complex relationship with Fen Caldra, who holds leverage over him using the Warden's Seal. This leverage stems from a forged customs document that implicated Orris in a cargo irregularity. Their relationship is functional, not friendly, and has kept both out of serious trouble.
